svg.title: UACP Agile Sprint Roadmap
svg.desc: 8 two-week sprints, each with a shippable demo goal, building from basic text chat to multi-modal accessible communication platform

g.text: Demo: curl hits /communicate/stream, gets streamed GPT-4o text back

svg.text: Spring Boot + WebFlux skeleton · Azure OpenAI wired via Spring AI
Local MongoDB (Docker) for session write · no auth yet

g.text: Demo: session history persists; second message in same session has context

svg.text: sessionId in request → load + append messages in Mongo
Sliding context window (last N messages) injected into Spring AI prompt
Swap local Mongo → Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB · deploy to AKS

g.text: Demo: send audio file → get back a streamed text reply

svg.text: Partial transcript streaming: start LLM before STT finishes

g.text: Demo: text in → spoken audio reply streamed back

svg.text: OutputType router · Azure Neural TTS transformer
OutputTypes[] in request: ["TEXT","VOICE"] returns both streams
Audio chunks to Azure Blob · CDN URL returned in SSE event

g.text: Demo: APIM in front; JWT required; multi-user sessions isolated

svg.text: Azure APIM + Azure AD B2C · Spring Security resource server
tenantId scoping on all Mongo queries · Redis hot session cache
Key Vault for all secrets · rate limiting rules in APIM

g.text: Demo: image/video in → description streamed back

svg.text: GPT-4o vision support · VIDEO/IMAGE input type preprocessor
Model selector routes to vision model automatically
App Insights traces · custom latency metrics per input/output type
Sprints 7+ — sign language · AAC symbols · haptic · enterprise integrations (decide after sprint 6)
